prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位 次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、重庆物理类考生小幅减少（约1.9%）、声誉偏负面等因素：计划持平使供需弹性主值为24396名，考生规模缩减对位次有轻微上移（数字 减小=更易进）作用，但位次长期后移趋势和声誉偏负面形成一定下行压力，两者相互抵消后预计位次小幅前移。预测2026年物理类最低位次约24346名，区间23846–24846名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17817 → 21067 → 23650 → 23888 → 24396, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6579 places; the pace slowed in the last 2 years (2024 shifted backward by 238 places compared to 2023, 2025 shifted backward by 508 places compared to 2024), with the 2025 baseline at about 24396; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 51 → 51 → 52 → 58 → 54, with 2025 at 54; the 2026 plan remains at 54, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations in recent years (2021: 86 → 2022: 88 → 2023: 87 → 2024: 86 → 2025: 88 → 2026: 92), overall at an upper-middle level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (a professor from the College of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, sparking public controversy), which may have a certain dampening effect on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking at 100th (average evaluation), short video exposure at a low-to-medium level, with no clear signs of increased popularity; no historical admission anomalies such as gaps related to this university; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Foreign Languages and Literature category enrolled in Physics Category; other enrolled majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine, Chemistry, Physics, etc.) do not have A-level evaluations but are mostly popular social directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc.; 2024–2026 major popularity data shows Computer Science remains recommended/highly recommended, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended, with overall engineering popularity remaining high; Chongqing's 2026 Physics Category examinees are about 136,900 (a decrease of about 1.9% from 139,500 in 2025), with a slight reduction in candidate scale, easing competitive pressure slightly; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years, not included in the main judgment; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, both in the central-western region with Chongqing, with no obvious regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a medium level, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in Chongqing Physics Category examinees (about 1.9%), and the negative reputation, among other factors: the unchanged plan makes the supply-demand elasticity baseline at 24396, the reduction in examinee scale has a slight upward effect on ranking (smaller number = easier to enter), but the long-term backward trend in rankings and negative reputation create some downward pressure, with the two offsetting each other, leading to an expected slight forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Physics Category is about 24346, with a range of 23846–24846.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23846), focus on applying for popular Tier 1 engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 24846), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while also considering Tier 2 medium majors. Although Clinical Medicine is Tier 1, note its longer duration; Law and Accounting are suitable for candidates with clear career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4052 → 3943 → 5522 → 4833 → 5044, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift (5522nd), rebounding to 4833rd in 2024, and shifting backward again to 5044th in 2025; the overall trend over the past 3 years has been a backward shift, with a baseline of approximately 5044th in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 32 → 33 → 34 → 30 → 34 students, with 34 students in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 34 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 100th (average evaluation), with short video exposure at a low to medium level; there are no related discontinuation events in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly corresponding to the Foreign Language and Literature category in History Category admissions; although majors like Chinese Language and Literature, History, and Ideological and Political Education (teacher training) do not have A-level evaluations, they benefit from the overall reputation of normal universities.

专业热度与地域.text: History Category admission majors mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Journalism and Communication, Accounting, Finance, Ideological and Political Education, History, etc.; 2024–2026 major popularity data shows Law as divergent/wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature as recommended, Journalism and Communication as clearly discouraged, Teacher Training/Education as divergent/wait-and-see, and Accounting/Finance/Auditing as recommended; in 2026, Chongqing's History Category examinees are approximately 72,100 (a decrease of about 1.7% from 73,400 in 2025), with a slight reduction in candidate scale, easing competitive pressure slightly; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score was 438 points, with little fluctuation in recent years, not included in the main judgment; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, both in the central and western regions with Chongqing, with no obvious regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations with a recent overall backward trend, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in Chongqing History Category examinees (about 1.7%), and a somewhat negative reputation: the unchanged plan makes the supply-demand elasticity baseline 5044th; the reduction in examinee scale has a slight upward effect on ranking (smaller number = easier to enter), but ranking fluctuations and negative reputation create some downward pressure, with the two offsetting each other, resulting in a slight forward shift in ranking.
